category_sources: source_facts.description says tunnelling for applications that do not speak IPv6; official GitHub README describes forwarding between IPv4 and IPv6 endpoints.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables lists 6tunnel; official GitHub repository title and README use 6tunnel.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides usage examples and behavior for IPv4/IPv6 tunneling.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/wojtekka/6tunnel, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe IPv4/IPv6 tunneling and forwarding behavior.
